scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions
scripts.deploy: npm run build && firebase deploy --only functions && npm run set-iam
scripts.set-iam: gcloud run services add-iam-policy-binding generatestickerspecs --region=asia-east1 --member=allUsers --role=roles/run.invoker --quiet && gcloud run services add-iam-policy-binding generatestickerimage --region=asia-east1 --member=allUsers --role=roles/run.invoker --quiet
